summary: With the OpenCL provider linked and an RTX 5060 Ti visible, bridge-free libbitcoin workload and public-op hooks decline under common repo-root/build-root invocation because OpenCLBackend::ensure_extended_kernels cannot find secp256k1_extended.cl through its current CWD-relative search paths. Evidence remains honest: benchmark JSON rows stay backend=cpu/evidence_class=api_correctness unless the direct hook accepts the exact batch and output matches the CPU oracle.

root_cause.reason: The extended kernel loader checks relative paths from the process current working directory. The libbitcoin benchmark binaries are normally invoked from repo root, build root, or compat/libbitcoin_direct build output paths that do not reach src/opencl/kernels/secp256k1_extended.cl or a staged copy.

reviewer_fixes.summary: Fixed validate-op post-hoc attribution probe to accept the validate-hook contract >=0 instead of the hash-hook contract ==0.
Added bounded benchmark-only GpuLastError diagnostics sourced from existing GpuBackend::last_error()/last_error_msg() without adding backend virtuals.
Registered the last-error diagnostic hook through the existing cached engine GPU backend.

validation.default_cwd_behavior: bench_lbtc_workloads emits CPU-only rows for txid_batch, wtxid_batch, merkle_pair_batch, and merkle_root_batch; each passes ci/check_lbtc_gpu_workload_evidence.py.
validation.public_ops_behavior: bench_lbtc_public_ops emits 22 rows under default CWD; direct-production rows keep backend=cpu when hooks decline; artifact passes ci/check_lbtc_gpu_workload_evidence.py.
validation.manual_kernel_staging_observation: When src/opencl/kernels is manually staged next to the benchmark binary, hash-type public ops including merkle_pair_hash reach the OpenCL RTX 5060 Ti path and match the CPU oracle. This is diagnostic only, not a supported build-flow claim.

smallest_fix_options: Update OpenCLBackend::ensure_extended_kernels path resolution in src/gpu/src/gpu_backend_opencl.cpp.
Add a compat/libbitcoin_direct CMake post-build kernel staging step for bench_lbtc_workloads and bench_lbtc_public_ops.
